title: Merge Intervals - 2
hints: Since intervals are sorted, you can process them in order.
For each existing interval, check its relationship with the new interval.
If an interval ends before the new interval starts, add it to the result.
If an interval starts after the new interval ends, add the new interval and all remaining intervals.
If intervals overlap, merge them by updating the new interval's start and end.
Don't forget to add the new interval if it hasn't been added yet (at the end).
